source.pdf: official_books/Nimble 5e TTRPG Heroes Core Book -- Evan Diaz -- 41845a084350bb7daa48eb313815b1f9 -- Anna’s Archive.pdf

class.name: Berserker
class.description: Wrath and ruin. Berserkers are relentless front-line destroyers who build and spend Fury to overwhelm enemies through sustained aggression.

progression.name: Rage
progression.description: (1/turn) Action: Roll a Fury Die (1d4) and set it aside. Add it to every STR attack you make. You can have a max of KEY (your highest key stat value) Fury Dice; they are lost when your Rage ends.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value. Budget around its 1/TURN limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

progression.name: That all you got?!
progression.description: When you are attacked, you may expend 1 or more Fury Dice to reduce the damage taken by STR+DEX for each die spent.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

progression.name: Intensifying Fury
progression.description: If you are Raging at the beginning of your turn, roll 1 Fury Die for free.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Track this resource every turn and spend it proactively instead of ending encounters with unused value.

progression.name: One with the Ancients
progression.description:
(1/Safe Rest) When faced with a decision about which direction
or course of action to take, you can call upon your ancestors to guide you toward the most
dangerous or challenging path.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value. Budget around its 1/SAFE REST limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Bloodlust
progression.description: Expend 1 or more Fury Dice on your turn, move DEX spaces per die spent for free.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this for positioning: engage priority targets, escape danger, or set up advantage before attacking.

progression.name: Enduring Rage
progression.description: While Dying, you Rage automatically for free at the beginning of your turn, have a max of 2 actions instead of 1, and ignore the STR saves to make attacks.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Savage Arsenal
progression.description: Choose 1 ability from the Savage Arsenal.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Rage (2)
progression.description: Whenever you Rage, gain 2 Fury Dice instead.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Track this resource every turn and spend it proactively instead of ending encounters with unused value.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Savage Arsenal (2)
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Intensifying Fury (2)
progression.description: Your Fury Dice are now d6s.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Track this resource every turn and spend it proactively instead of ending encounters with unused value.

progression.name: Intensifying Fury (5)
progression.description: Your Fury Dice are now d12s.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Track this resource every turn and spend it proactively instead of ending encounters with unused value.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: DEEP RAGE
progression.description: Dropping to 0 HP does not cause your Rage to end.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this to stabilize momentum mid-fight, ideally before allies are forced into defensive turns.

progression.name: Epic Boon
progression.description: Choose an Epic Boon (see pg. 23 of the GM's Guide).
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: BOUNDLESS RAGE
progression.description:
+1 to any 2 of your stats. Anytime you roll less than 6 on a Fury Die,
change it to 6 instead.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Track this resource every turn and spend it proactively instead of ending encounters with unused value.

choiceOptions.name: Death Blow
choiceOptions.description:
After you deal damage from a crit, you
may expend any number of Fury Dice. Sum the dice and deal double that amount of damage.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

choiceOptions.name: Deathless Rage
choiceOptions.description: (1/turn) While Dying, you may suffer 1 Wound to gain 1 action.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Save this for enemy spike turns; it is strongest when it prevents a big tempo or survivability loss. Budget around its 1/TURN limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

choiceOptions.name: Eager for Battle
choiceOptions.description: Gain advantage on Initiative. Move 2×DEX spaces for free on your first turn each encounter.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Use this for positioning: engage priority targets, escape danger, or set up advantage before attacking.

choiceOptions.name: Into the Fray
choiceOptions.description: Action: Leap up to 2×DEX spaces toward an enemy. If you land adjacent to at least 2 enemies, make an attack against 1 of them for free.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

choiceOptions.name: Mighty Endurance
choiceOptions.description: You can now survive an additional 4 Wounds before death.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Save this for enemy spike turns; it is strongest when it prevents a big tempo or survivability loss.

choiceOptions.name: MORE BLOOD!
choiceOptions.description:
Whenever an enemy crits you, gain
1 Fury Die.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Pair this with crit-fishing turns and high-accuracy setups to maximize burst value.

choiceOptions.name: Rampage
choiceOptions.description:
(1/ turn) After you land a hit, you may
treat your next attack this turn as if you rolled that same amount instead of rolling again.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

choiceOptions.name: Swift Fury
choiceOptions.description:
Whenever you gain one or more Fury
Dice, move up to DEX spaces for free, ignoring difficult terrain.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Use this for positioning: engage priority targets, escape danger, or set up advantage before attacking.

choiceOptions.name: Thunderous Steps
choiceOptions.description:
After moving at least 4 spaces
while Raging, you may deal STR Bludgeoning damage to all adjacent creatures where you stop.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

choiceOptions.name: Unstoppable Force
choiceOptions.description: While Dying and Raging, taking damage causes 1 Wound (instead of 2) and critical hits inflict 2 Wounds (instead of 3).
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Pair this with crit-fishing turns and high-accuracy setups to maximize burst value.

choiceOptions.name: Whirlwind
choiceOptions.description:
2 actions: Attack ALL targets within
your melee weapon’s reach.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

choiceOptions.name: You’re Next!
choiceOptions.description:
Action: While Raging, you can make
a Might skill check to demoralize an enemy within Reach 12 (DC: their current HP). On a success, they immediately flee the battle.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

choiceOptions.name: Mountain’s Endurance
choiceOptions.description: While Dying, if an attack against you would be a crit, the attack is rerolled instead (when-crit abilities, such as Titan’s Fury, still trigger).
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 15. Pair this with crit-fishing turns and high-accuracy setups to maximize burst value.

choiceOptions.name: Stone’s Resilience
choiceOptions.description: Whenever you expend Fury Dice to reduce incoming damage, add the value of the die to the amount reduced.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 3. Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

choiceOptions.name: Titan’s Fury
choiceOptions.description: After you miss an attack or are crit by an enemy, Rage for free.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 11. Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

choiceOptions.name: Unbreakable
choiceOptions.description:
(1/encounter) While Raging, if you would suffer your last Wound or other
negative condition of your choice, you don’t.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 7. Save this for enemy spike turns; it is strongest when it prevents a big tempo or survivability loss. Budget around its 1/ENCOUNTER limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

choiceOptions.name: Mountainous Tenacity
choiceOptions.description: Whenever you expend your Hit Dice to recover HP, for every 10 HP you would recover, you may heal 1 Wound instead.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 3. Save this for enemy spike turns; it is strongest when it prevents a big tempo or survivability loss.

choiceOptions.name: Blood Frenzy
choiceOptions.description: (1/turn) While Raging, whenever you crit or kill an enemy, change 1 Fury Die to the maximum.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 3. Pair this with crit-fishing turns and high-accuracy setups to maximize burst value. Budget around its 1/TURN limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

choiceOptions.name: Onslaught
choiceOptions.description: While Raging, gain +2 speed. (1/per round) you may move for free.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 15. Use this for positioning: engage priority targets, escape danger, or set up advantage before attacking.

choiceOptions.name: Opportunistic Frenzy
choiceOptions.description: While Raging, you can make opportunity attacks without disadvantage, and you may make them whenever an enemy enters your melee weapon's reach.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 11. Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

choiceOptions.name: Savage Awareness
choiceOptions.description: Advantage on Perception checks to notice or track down blood. Blindsight 2 while raging. You ignore the Blinded condition and can see through darkness and Invisibility within that Range.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 3. Use this to control enemy behavior and create safer turns for your team focus-fire.

choiceOptions.name: Unstoppable Brutality
choiceOptions.description: While Raging, you may gain 1 wound to reroll any attack or save.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 7. Save this for enemy spike turns; it is strongest when it prevents a big tempo or survivability loss.
